action.reasoning: Observation: the patched ensemble/TTA predict path succeeded and improved Quickdraw accuracy substantially from 0.1835 to 0.1930 using the 2e+3e checkpoints with two-view TTA. Analysis: the gain may come from TTA, checkpoint ensembling, or both; since the 3e checkpoint alone was slightly worse than 2e, it is worth isolating whether the known-best 2e checkpoint with the same TTA is even better than the 2e+3e average. Decision: create a single-checkpoint TTA manifest for baseline.pt and submit it without retraining, preserving the current best ensemble if this underperforms.
